segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic-style classroom interior with students seated at wooden benches. Natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, illuminating the stone walls and an ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling. The room features a large stone archway at the far end and a raised teacher's platform on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, cinematic view of a gothic-style classroom that emphasizes the interplay between heavy stone architecture and soft natural light. It begins by capturing the stillness of the interior, where students sit poised at wooden benches beneath a vaulted ceiling. As the eye wanders, the focus shifts toward the left side of the room, where light filters through tall arched windows to illuminate the textured stone walls. The perspective then expands to encompass the ornate iron chandelier hanging above before finally settling on the large stone archway and the raised teacher's platform at the far end of the hall.
